command:
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'
echo '=== DEPLOY SCHEMA ==='
echo '' | base64 -d | ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     'mkdir -p /home/jose/moreno-ai/docs/comms /home/jose/moreno-ai/docs/n8n-exports && cat > /home/jose/moreno-ai/docs/comms/moreno-message-envelope-v1.schema.json' 2>&1

echo '=== DEPLOY ARCH DOC ==='
echo '' | base64 -d | ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     'cat > /home/jose/moreno-ai/docs/comms/comms-fabric-architecture-v1.md' 2>&1

echo DONE_2005
